title: Agentic web: Weaving the next web with ai agents
abstract: The emergence of AI agents powered by large language models (LLMs) marks a pivotal shifttoward the Agentic Web, a new phase of the internet defined by autonomous, goal-driveninteractions. In this paradigm, agents interact directly with one another to plan, coordinate,and execute complex tasks on behalf of users. This transition from human-driven to machine-to-machine interaction allows intent to be delegated, relieving users from routine digitaloperations and enabling a more interactive, automated web experience.
